summary: Full backend + frontend regression of VisionaryX rebuild. 23/23 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend login → dashboard → alerts flow all pass with every required data-testid present and expected content rendered.

minor.issue: Not exposed via the public preview URL because the ingress only proxies /api/*. Backend internally returns {status:'healthy'} on port 8001. Not a bug, but note for external monitors — they must hit a /api-prefixed health route or rely on /api/v1/meta/version.

issues: RN-Web deprecation warnings: shadow* style props (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should be migrated.
Expo dev WebSocket /ws connection logs a 502 in console — harmless dev-only HMR socket, not present in production builds.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate RN-Web deprecated style props (shadow*, props.pointerEvents) to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence console warnings.
(Optional) Suppress the /ws HMR websocket in web builds, or document it as a dev-only artifact.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file 696 lines — within limit but trending; consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/alerts.py, etc. when more endpoints land.
analytics_overview returns detection_trend_7d as random.randint(...) — placeholder value, not a real % delta. Should be computed from detection_trends collection.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=False is acceptable since tokens flow via Authorization header; documented intent.
_id is consistently mapped to id in all public responses — good. No ObjectId leakage.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on requested flows (login validation, wrong-pw inline error, dashboard KPIs/charts/alerts/neural cards, alerts tab with chips/search/rows)

test_credentials: Admin admin@visionaryx.dev / VisionX2025! and operator@visionaryx.dev / Operator2025! both work as documented.
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_new_<uuid>@visionaryx.dev users (left in DB; registration test) and a TEST_cam_<uuid> camera (cleaned up via DELETE in the same test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend on port 8001 with /api/v1 prefix; only /api/* is proxied through the preview URL — hit /health on http://localhost:8001 directly. Demo data is seeded once at startup (6 cameras, 24 alerts spread over 48h, 30-day detection_trends, admin + operator users). Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health/meta, auth, analytics, alerts, cameras (incl. operator-403), stream, users (admin-only). Frontend test-ids are stable on Login/Overview/Alerts screens. Expo dev bundle on web takes ~10-15s on first hit — use 30s+ wait_for_selector. expo-secure-store is shimmed to localStorage key 'visionaryx_token' on web.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional defects encountered. Single test-script adjustment: /health is internal-only because the K8s ingress only routes /api/* to backend, so I switched that one test to http://localhost:8001/health which returns the expected JSON.
